headings.text: Focal Introduces the Utopia Cinema Range
Focal Introduces the Utopia Cinema Range

If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingFocal Introduces the Utopia Cinema RangePosted on June 4, 2025Focal Introduces the Utopia Cinema RangeIncludes one 3-way loudspeaker — Cinema LCR — and one subwoofer — Cinema SUB.Original article posted at: linkFocal presents Utopia Cinema, a range designed for private cinema rooms of up to 2153 sq ft (200m²).It includes one 3-way loudspeaker — Cinema LCR — and one subwoofer — Cinema SUB. Utopia Cinema features the latest audio technologies from the brand’s professional division, including the recently announced Utopia Main studio monitors.Cinema LCRThis full-range, high SPL-capacity loudspeaker provides power and precision, adapting to the requirements of the most optimized listening environments. The different crossover settings, such as the 0–30-degree selector, maximize the performance of each loudspeaker depending on its purpose (central, left or right channel), while its speaker drivers offer outstanding treble, midrange and bass reproduction.New 1.5-inch “M”-shaped beryllium tweeter: The combination of beryllium and its “M” shape delivers an exceptional transient response and unique treble sound reproduction. The tweeter’s power handling is improved by a 1-inch coil and optimized heat dissipation. This speaker driver extends the ultra-high response with no distortion, while halving THD to 3kHz thanks to TMD (Tuned Mass Damper) technology complete with a Poron surround. Lastly, its rear acoustic environment is fully optimized with a waveguide and IAL (Infinite Acoustic Load) technology, further enhancing its sound performance.New 5-inch “M”-shaped, “W”-cone midrange: This transducer is capable of delivering an impressive dynamic range and transparency, thanks to the sound optimization of its magnet to prevent resonance. Moving in a perfect piston movement, the “M” shape creates a completely flat wave thanks to its shallow depth. In addition, its small-roll surround with integrated TMD technology significantly reduces the intermodulation created by the surround. Voice reproduction is ultra-natural.13-inch high-excursion “W”-cone woofer: This speaker driver is housed in a solid cabinet, fitted with a large vent. By combining super-light moving components with a flexible surround, it offers excellent articulation and definition.Cinema SUBCinema SUB’s two 13-inch woofers guarantee maximum excursion and uncompromising bass control. Tuned to 19 Hz, it delivers a unique extension for a deep and striking bass, even in the most spacious cinema rooms. Thanks to its advanced sound design, it blends seamlessly into multichannel systems.Large front laminar port: Designed to minimize distortion while maximizing sound pressure, descending to lower frequencies while increasing their efficiency, for an impactful sub-bass.Robust construction: This subwoofer has been created to meet the demands of high-SPL configurations, preserving flawless sound quality.Unlimited Modular ConfigurationsUtopia Cinema loudspeakers and subwoofers can be installed in a modular system. Products can be fixed onto or into the wall, positioned horizontally or vertically, and with the desired number added, to achieve an on-demand sound pressure level. Configurations are limited only by the size of the space in which the solution is integrated. Cinema LCR and Cinema SUB can also be combined with loudspeakers from the Focal 1000 Series. Both ranges feature the same technologies, from the “W” cone to the beryllium tweeter, and both deliver an immersive listening experience with the same signature sound.Pricing and AvailabilityCinema LCR – $11,999 ($15,999 CAD)Cinema SUB – $5999 ($7999 CAD)Product will be available September 2025.‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍‍‍‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
